table.style: margin: 0; margin-left: 10px; border-collapse: collapse; table-layout: fixed; width: 100%; border-top: 1px solid #000;

th.style: display: table-cell; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; width: 5%; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
display: table-cell; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; width: 20%; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
th.span: เลขที่ใบกำกับ

th.style: display: table-cell; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; width: 15%; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
display: table-cell; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; width: 15%; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
th.span: วันครบกำหนด

th.style: display: table-cell; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; width: 15%; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
display: table-cell; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; width: 15%; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
display: table-cell; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; width: 15%; border-top: 1px solid #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
th.span: เงินคงค้าง

td.style: border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;

table.style: margin: 0; margin-left: 10px; border-collapse: collapse; table-layout: fixed; width: 100%;

td.style: width: 70%; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
width: 15%; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
td.b: รวมเงินทั้งสิ้น

td.style: width: 15%; border-top: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000;
border-top: none; border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000; min-height: 80px; padding: 8px; font-size: 12px;
border-left: 1px dashed #000; border-right: 1px dashed #000; border-bottom: 1px solid #000; padding: 0;

div.span: ชื่อผู้วางบิล
